strengths: Clean separation between pure validation functions and route handlers
Lazy multer loading pattern prevents test collection failures when multer is not installed
Path traversal protection in tryDeleteOldUploadedLogo (checks base for slashes and verifies absPath prefix)
Proper transaction wrapping in reset-app with rollback on error and client.release() in finally
Consistent error handling with appropriate HTTP status codes (400, 409, 413)
All 29 tests pass and cover pure function validation thoroughly
TDD approach correctly followed — tests written first, implementation follows

issues.description: PATCH handler includes dead code path for an `updates` array format (lines ~158-185) that is not in the spec or test suite. The spec documents boardName/logoPath/version as top-level fields. This array path has minimal test coverage and could be removed to reduce complexity.
